items.title: Mulberry cuts losses as turnaround takes shape
items.summary: Drapers Mulberry cuts losses as turnaround takes shape Mulberry has reduced its operating loss by 84% to £4.3m in the 52 weeks to 28 March 2026 compared with £27.1m the previous year. The post Mulberry cuts losses as turnaround takes shape appeared first on Drapers .
